description: CompositionOrange T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron Is the techie in your little one already showing up? Then this t-shirt from tantra is a great way to flaunt his IT-oriented attitude. Team this cotton T-shirt with denim trousers or shorts and floaters, and encourage his thirst to learn more about computers in style.
